nodes.name: PDF to PNG (CloudConvert)
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: Only needed for PDF covers. Sign up free at cloudconvert.com (25 conversions/day). Replace YOUR_CLOUDCONVERT_API_KEY with your key.

nodes.name: OCR Image
nodes.notes: Free OCR via ocr.space — 25,000 requests/month free tier. Get your key at ocr.space/ocrapi

parameters.subject: =✅ Your Book Cover Has Been Approved - {{ $json.Book_Title }}
parameters.message:
=

✅ Cover Approved!

Dear {{ $json.Author_Name }},

Great news! Your book cover for "{{ $json.Book_Title }}" (ISBN: {{ $json.ISBN }}) has passed our automated quality validation.

  • ✅ Badge area clear — no text in award zone
  • ✅ Safe margins respected (3mm from all edges)
  • ✅ Image quality approved
  • ✅ Text legibility verified

Confidence Score: {{ $json.Confidence_Score }}%

Your cover is now ready for the next stage of production. 🎉

Best regards,
BookLeaf Publishing Team
Automated Cover Validation System

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Action Required: Book Cover Revision Needed - {{ $json.Book_Title }}
parameters.message:
=

⚠️ Revision Required

Dear {{ $json.Author_Name }},

Our automated system has detected issues with your book cover for "{{ $json.Book_Title }}" (ISBN: {{ $json.ISBN }}) that require correction before it can be approved.

Issues Found: 
{{ $json.Correction_Instructions }}

Confidence Score: {{ $json.Confidence_Score }}%

Next Steps:
  1. Review the issues listed above
  2. Make the necessary corrections to your cover file
  3. Resubmit to the same Google Drive folder
  4. Use filename: {{ $json.ISBN }}_text.pdf (or .png)

Expected resubmission: Within 48 hours

Need help? Contact: support@bookleafpub.com

Best regards,
BookLeaf Publishing Team
Automated Cover Validation System
